archetype: Archetype 7: Electric & Neon (Cyberpunk/Futuristic) mixed with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) for premium glass depth
design_vision: A premium 'Tron meets Apple Vision Pro' Minesweeper. Holographic tiles over deep frosted glass. Avoids standard purple/violet cyberpunk cliches in favor of Electric Cyan and Hot Coral. High-end, immersive, and tactical.

rules: NO Inter, NO Space Grotesk. Use Orbitron for all display/headings, and JetBrains Mono for UI labels, timer, and grid numbers.
Headings should have tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Overlines/labels should be uppercase, small, and wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

surfaces_and_effects.tile_unrevealed: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-[#00E5FF]/50 transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer

layout.global: Full viewport height (`h-screen`), overflow hidden. The main background image covers the screen. All content lives inside frosted glass bento containers.
layout.dashboard_stats: A top control bar. Uses grid or flex with dense spacing. Contains: Timer, Lives indicator (3 glowing shields/hearts), Score counter, and Difficulty Selector.
layout.game_grid: CSS Grid layout that dynamically adjusts columns based on difficulty (e.g., grid-cols-9, grid-cols-16). Grid gap should be 2px to 4px max to maintain the tactical board feel.

components.app_wrapper: Div with absolute background image and a dark overlay `bg-black/40` to ensure contrast.
components.stats_panel: Glassmorphism header. Values like timer and score MUST use JetBrains Mono `text-2xl` or `text-3xl` with `text-[#00E5FF]` and neon glow.
components.cell: Interactive div representing a single tile. Requires `framer-motion` for interactions (scale down on click, pop on reveal).
components.leaderboard: Glass panel table showing top players. Columns: Rank, Name, Score, Time. Zebra striping with `bg-white/5`.
components.game_over_modal: Frosted glass modal overlaid on screen. If victory: Cyan glowing text. If defeat: Red glowing text. Includes input for Name to submit to Leaderboard.

animations.cell_reveal: Framer motion layout transition. `initial={{ scale: 0.8, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }}`.
animations.explosion: Screen shake animation (`framer-motion` keyframes on main container). Red flash overlay `bg-red-500/20` fading out.
animations.victory_scanline: A sweeping bright cyan gradient line moving across the grid.
animations.hover_state: Subtle brightness increase and border color transition to neon.

mechanics.lives_system: Player starts with 3 lives. Uncovering a mine removes 1 life and flags the mine automatically. Game ends only if lives reach 0.
mechanics.timer: Starts on first click. Formatted as 000.
mechanics.score_system: Score increases per safe cell revealed. Faster times yield a higher score multiplier. Subtract massive points for lost lives.
mechanics.leaderboard: Submit Player Name and Score to MongoDB. Fetch Top 10 on load.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (cells, difficulty buttons, submit button, modals) MUST have descriptive `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='grid-cell-0-0'`, `data-testid='difficulty-medium'`, `data-testid='submit-score-btn'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion.
Import fonts Orbitron and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.css.
Build the UI directly into the application using raw HTML/Tailwind for the glass layout to ensure creative freedom, but use Shadcn for complex inputs/selects if needed.
Implement the 3-lives logic explicitly in the game engine state.
Add audio context or HTML5 Audio for sound effects (click, flag, explosion, win) using online free resources or generated sounds if applicable.
Setup a simple Express/FastAPI backend or mock it for the Leaderboard functionality if full stack is required.
